name: Improper Restriction of Names for Files and Other Resources
description: The product constructs file or resource names from upstream input without properly restricting the resulting names. This can lead to execution of malicious scripts in browsers, exploitation of parser vulnerabilities, or other harmful outcomes depending on how these resources are consumed.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user input used to construct a resource name in a TRANSFORM node, which then flows to a STORAGE or EGRESS node without a CONTROL node validating or sanitizing the resulting name against dangerous characters, extensions, or path components.
